title: Dreamy Smoky Ukrainian Napa Cabbage Dumplings
description: A comforting Ukrainian dish featuring napa cabbage and smoky flavors, perfect for a sick day, wrapped in lotus leaves and baked to perfection in a tandoor, ovo-vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine chopped napa cabbage, shredded smoked mozzarella cheese, all purpose flour, egg, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Lay a large lotus leaf flat on a work surface and place a tablespoon of the cabbage mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the leaf over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape, and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to form 12 dumplings.
Place the dumplings in the preheated tandoor, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
Drizzle the dumplings with olive oil and sprinkle with tandoor spice blend.
Bake the dumplings for 25 minutes, or until the lotus leaves are crispy and the filling is heated through.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
